title: elaeocarpus lanceifolius
intro: Elaeocarpus lanceifolius, also known as the lance-leaved blueberry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus lanceifolius include tea, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
